app.title: In-toto: A framework to secure the integrity of software supply chains
app.author: Erenay09
app.description: In-toto is a framework for securing the integrity of software supply chains using Provenance and Policy Enforcement
proposed_tests: Install in-toto and create a project
Add a build step to the supply chain
Check that the in-toto framework reports any unauthorized changes to the supply chain
